SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Class Dd

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.Dd
public class Dd extends Object
Data Definition (DD) representing a dataset or file resource.

This class encapsulates attributes commonly found in JCL DD statements, such as dataset name (DSN), disposition (DISP), record format (RECFM), and logical record length (LRECL).

  • Method Details

    • getMaxReclen

      public int getMaxReclen()
      Gets the maximum record length.
      Returns:
      the max LRECL, or defaults for SYSOUT/Instream.

    • getMinReclen

      public int getMinReclen()
      Gets the minimum record length.
      Returns:
      the min LRECL.

    • hasLrecl

      public boolean hasLrecl()
      Checks if LRECL is defined.
      Returns:
      true if LRECL is present.

    • getDispStatus

      public Disposition getDispStatus()
      Gets the initial status disposition (NEW, OLD, SHR, MOD).
      Returns:
      the status disposition.

    • getDispNormal

      public Disposition getDispNormal()
      Gets the normal termination disposition (KEEP, DELETE, CATLG, UNCATLG, PASS).
      Returns:
      the normal disposition.

    • getDispAbnormal

      public Disposition getDispAbnormal()
      Gets the abnormal termination disposition.
      Returns:
      the abnormal disposition.

    • setDisp

      public void setDisp(Disposition[] disp)
      Sets the dispositions.
      Parameters:
      disp - the disposition array.

    • hasPath

      public boolean hasPath()
      Checks if a path is defined.
      Returns:
      true if path is not null.

    • hasMember

      public boolean hasMember()
      Checks if a member is defined.
      Returns:
      true if member is not empty.

    • isSysout

      public boolean isSysout()
      Checks if this is a SYSOUT DD.
      Returns:
      true if sysout is defined.

    • isInStream

      public boolean isInStream()
      Checks if this is in-stream data.
      Returns:
      true if in-stream data is present.

    • isExplicitFilename

      public boolean isExplicitFilename()
      Checks if this uses an explicit filename/path instead of DSN.
      Returns:
      true if DSN is null and path is set.

    • isGdg

      public boolean isGdg()
      Checks if this refers to a GDG and a GDG version is associated.
      Returns:
      true if GDG info is present.

    • concatenate

      public void concatenate(Dd dd)
      Concatenates another DD to this one.
      Parameters:
      dd - the DD to concatenate.

    • builder

      public static Dd.Builder builder()
      Creates a builder for Dd.
      Returns:
      a new Builder instance.
